chrome-devtools._note: DevTools integration. Enable for performance traces or when playwright insufficient.

github._note: Unified GitHub MCP: combines official @modelcontextprotocol/server-github (26 tools) with custom PR update tool (github_update_pull_request)

git._note: Git operations wrapper using @cyanheads/git-mcp-server (27 tools). Uses GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN from .env.local for authenticated push/pull/fetch operations. Secure GIT_ASKPASS authentication - token never exposed in command line.

github-setup._note: Repository setup tools (branch protection). Enable when needed for repo configuration.
